name: Wand of Magic Missiles
description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend no more than 3 charges to cast Magic Missile from it. For 1 charge, you cast the level 1 version of the spell. You can increase the spell's level by 1 for each additional charge you expend.

regaining_charges.on_roll_1: Wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed
